assertions.title: Monthly balance snapshot

steps.observed: Net Worth page loaded successfully

steps.expected: Shows date, per-account balances, total assets, total liabilities, net worth
steps.observed: Snapshot History shows March 2026 with Assets $189,914.43, Liabilities $2,500.34, Net Worth $187,414.09
All 4 accounts shown: Alliant Primary Checking $8,125.43, Alliant Savings $25,000.00, Capital One Quicksilver $2,500.34, Wealthfront Investment $156,789.00

assertions.issues: Empty state not testable as seed data already populates snapshots. Main functionality verified.

steps.action: View Net Worth Over Time chart on /net-worth
steps.expected: Line chart with data points from monthly snapshots
steps.observed: Chart titled 'Net Worth Over Time' displayed with data points for March 2026

steps.expected: X-axis shows months, Y-axis shows dollar amounts
steps.observed: X-axis shows 'March 2026', Y-axis shows $0 to $200k+ scale

steps.expected: Chart doesn't break with single data point
steps.observed: Chart renders correctly with single March 2026 data point showing Assets (blue), Liabilities (red), and Net Worth
Legend shows Assets, Liabilities, Net Worth with corresponding colors

steps.expected: Total assets, total liabilities, and net worth displayed
steps.observed: Three summary cards: Total Assets $189,914.43, Total Liabilities $2,500.34, Net Worth $187,414.09
$187,414.09 displayed correctly
Blue 'Take Snapshot' button displayed at top of page

steps.expected: New snapshot captured and appears in history
steps.observed: Success toast 'Snapshot captured successfully!' displayed. Snapshot History shows March 2026 entry with current balances.

steps.action: Check Per-Account Balance History section on /net-worth
steps.observed: Section titled 'Per-Account Balance History' displays all 4 accounts with March 2026 balances
Alliant Primary Checking $8,125.43, Alliant Savings $25,000.00, Capital One Quicksilver $2,500.34, Wealthfront Investment $156,789.00

steps.expected: Asset and liability accounts visually distinguished
steps.observed: Green dots for asset accounts (Checking, Savings, Investment), red dot for liability (Capital One Quicksilver CC)
Total Assets displayed as $189,914.43 — matches sum
Total Liabilities displayed as $2,500.34 — matches
Net Worth displayed as $187,414.09 — correct
Accounts page shows identical balances: Checking $8,125.43, Savings $25,000.00, CC $2,500.34, Investment $156,789.00
Alliant Primary Checking $8,125.43, Alliant Savings $25,000.00, Capital One Quicksilver $2,500.34, Wealthfront Investment $156,789.00
Dashboard shows Net Worth $187,414.09 — matches Net Worth page

steps.expected: Total assets, liabilities, net worth match account sums
steps.observed: Total Assets $189,914.43 (sum of checking+savings+investment), Total Liabilities $2,500.34 (credit card), Net Worth $187,414.09 — all consistent
Monthly Spending $3,179.34 — the $1,000.00 'Transfer to Savings' is not included

steps.expected: Transfer excluded from budget spent totals
steps.observed: Budget page shows $3,179.34 spent — no transfer amount included in any category
Analytics Total Spending $3,179.34, category breakdown sums to $3,179.34 with no transfer category
Month-over-Month table on dashboard shows categories totaling $3,179.34 for March 2026, no transfer entry

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. Net Worth page displays correct snapshot data, chart, breakdown, manual trigger, per-account history, and calculation. Account balances are consistent across Accounts, Dashboard, and Net Worth views. Transfers are properly excluded from spending totals, budgets, analytics, and month-over-month comparisons.
